gaps: A working CourtListener MCP server (every call failed server-side with 'REDIS_URL is not set'); the originating district-court record would have materially sharpened this prediction
Statpack cuts for circuit-court entry-pinned events by event kind (petition/motion/order), not just case-level dispositions by court
A provisioned copy of, or pointer into, the originating district-court docket for appellate cells
notes: Corpus priors for ca1 have mismatched opinion text (see flags.json), so fedcourts query contributed only disposition labels. The two query calls cost 285 ranged GETs / ~75 MB for one usable topic-matched prior; a --fields flag to skip opinion text would cut that substantially.
